text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Japanese Oaks has arrived. Air
Groove's mother won this race in the past, and
Air Groove strives to follow in her footsteps.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove wonders how her mother felt when she
ran here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She steps onto the track with heightened focus,
determined to chase her ideal.
